name: bheeshma
description: Runtime dependency behavior monitor for Node.js — the strace for npm packages. Detects supply-chain attacks that static analysis misses. Zero dependencies. Zero config. Zero telemetry.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "if(process.env.npm_config_global){console.log('');console.log('  bheeshma v'+require('./package.json').version+' — strace for npm packages');console.log('  Runtime dependency behavior monitor for Node.js');console.log('');console.log('  Star us on GitHub if bheeshma saved your project:');console.log('  https://github.com/bb1nfosec/bheeshma');console.log('');}"

author: bb1nfosec
